ddls:
CREATE TABLE "forums" (
  "forum_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forum */,
  "forum_name" TEXT /* Name of the forum */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the forum's topic or purpose */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the forum was created */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the forum */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the forum */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the forum */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of views for the forum */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Last date of activity in the forum */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forum_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forums_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "forum_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forum where the topic is located */,
  "topic_title" TEXT /* Title of the topic */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the topic was created */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the topic */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the topic */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the topic */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of views for the topic */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Last date of activity in the topic */,
  "locked" INTEGER /* Indicates if the topic is locked for new posts */,
  "pinned" INTEGER /* Indicates if the topic is pinned to the top of the forum */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topics_forum_id FOREIGN KEY ("forum_id") REFERENCES forums ("forum_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topics_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic where the file is uploaded */,
  "filename" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "filesize" TEXT /* Size of the file */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the file has been downloaded */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of views for the file */,
  "last_viewed" TEXT /* Last date the file was viewed */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* MIME type of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., member, moderator, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief bio of the user */,
  "interests" TEXT /* Interests of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Last date the user was active */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, banned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
